'''nachushu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pneumatotaxy|pneumatotaxy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-ch-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pneumatotaxy|pneumatotaxy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| nachushu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:næchishith|næchishith]] || [[word:næchishij|næchishij]] || [[word:næchishish|næchishish]] || [[word:næchishi|næchishi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nachuchushuth|nachuchushuth]] || [[word:nachuchushuj|nachuchushuj]] || [[word:nachuchushush|nachuchushush]] || [[word:nachuchushu|nachuchushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nachushuth|nachushuth]] || [[word:nachushuj|nachushuj]] || [[word:nachushush|nachushush]] || [[word:nachushu|nachushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nachufshuth|nachufshuth]] || [[word:nachufshuj|nachufshuj]] || [[word:nachufshush|nachufshush]] || [[word:nachufshuf|nachufshuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nachushuthu|nachushuthu]] || [[word:nachushuju|nachushuju]] || [[word:nachushushu|nachushushu]] || [[word:nachushuku|nachushuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nachushuth|nachushuth]] || [[word:nachushuj|nachushuj]] || [[word:nachushush|nachushush]] || [[word:nachushu|nachushu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nachushuthul|nachushuthul]] || [[word:nachushujul|nachushujul]] || [[word:nachushushul|nachushushul]] || [[word:nachushukul|nachushukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nachushuthuthu|nachushuthuthu]] || [[word:nachushujuju|nachushujuju]] || [[word:nachushushushu|nachushushushu]] || [[word:nachushuku|nachushuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nachushuthun|nachushuthun]] || [[word:nachushujun|nachushujun]] || [[word:nachushushun|nachushushun]] || [[word:nachushukun|nachushukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nachushuthuoro|nachushuthuoro]] || [[word:nachushujuoro|nachushujuoro]] || [[word:nachushushuoro|nachushushuoro]] || [[word:nachushukuoro|nachushukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
